Conduction Warrior Plasma Magnum._current: 2 EARTH Rock monsters ① Face-up monsters on the field become EARTH. ② HOPT | If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can SEARCH 1 "Magnet" Normal, Quick-Play, or Field Spell. ③ HOPT | You can send 1 Level 8 "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster.
Conduction Warrior Plasma Magnum.previous: 2 EARTH Rock monsters Face-up monsters on the field become EARTH. You can only use each of the following effects of "Conduction Warrior Plasma Magnum" once per turn. If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can SEARCH 1 "Magnet" Normal, Quick-Play, or Field Spell. You can send 1 Level 8 "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster.

Dragonic Warrior._current: HOPT | You can DISCARD 1 card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Dragonic Warrior", but NEGATE its effects.

Illusion Gate._current: Pay half your LP; DESTROY as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your opponent's GY to your field, ignoring its Summoning conditions. You can only apply this effect of "Illusion Gate" once per Duel.

Matador Archfiend._current:
You can Ritual Summon this card with "Ritual of the Matador".
① HOPT | If this card is Ritual Summoned: You can SEARCH 2 "Archfiend" cards except "Matador Archfiend", also this card cannot attack for the rest of this turn.
② Cannot be destroyed by battle, also you take no battle damage from battles involving this card.
③ After damage calculation, if this card battled a monster: DESTROY that monster, and if you do, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
